summary: Task B: add a pure teampacket.ts module that turns scorer route:"team" Gate-1 assumptions into a paste-able, capped, risk-ranked 'Questions for your team' relay packet; surface it advisory-only after the Gate-1 plan and record it in the gate1_awaiting ledger event; document the assume-unless-vetoed flow (approve=assume, team veto=founder rejects with correction via existing Gate 1/2 machinery — no new pause state); add headless teampacket_test.sh wired into the verify gate. Additive only: no PLAN-JSON/renderFounderPlan/DoD/control-flow change. Excludes Task C calibration tiers.
steps: Add extensions/foreman/teampacket.ts: pure, node-builtin-only, `import type { ScoredAssumption } from "./scorer.ts"` only. buildTeamPacket(scored, opts?={max?:5}) filters route==="team", drops risk==="low", sorts risk-desc defensively, caps at max(=5), renders compact markdown headed `## Questions for your team (relay these)` with self-contained near-yes/no 'I'm assuming X' items carrying confidence, risk band, and scorer reasons; founder-relay wording; returns "" when empty. Mirror the pure-header style of scorer.ts/reviewer.ts/docdrift.ts.

Wire into index.ts Gate-1 render path (around index.ts:1706-1736): import scoreAssumptions and buildTeamPacket; after renderFounderPlan compute scored = scoreAssumptions(drafted.plan.assumptions, { highRiskPaths: loadHighRiskPaths(cwd), blastRadius: drafted.plan.blastRadius, filesLikely: drafted.plan.filesLikely }) (mirror planner.renderAssumptions ctx) and packet = buildTeamPacket(scored); when non-empty append packet as its own advisory section AFTER the plan in both the emit string and plan.md, and add a teamPacket field to the gate1_awaiting appendLog event. No change to PLAN-JSON, renderFounderPlan output, or control flow.

Update extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md: add a teampacket.ts module-map row and document the assume-unless-vetoed flow in the Gate-1 sections (05/07/08) — team-routed assumptions produce a relay packet, approve=assume, team veto=founder rejects with the correction at Gate 1/2 via the existing reject->devContext path, no separate park/resume/pause state.

Add extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh (headless, ROOT_DIR + node --input-type=module + pathToFileURL import of teampacket.ts): assert only route:"team" included and founder/self excluded; risk-desc ordering; low dropped; cap respected (7 team items -> 5 shown); empty -> ""; item contains assumption text + confidence + risk + reasons; grep-guard that index.ts Gate-1 path calls buildTeamPacket and that .pi/foreman.json verify runs teampacket_test.sh.
Update .pi/foreman.json verify gate command to insert `&& bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh` (after scorer_test.sh) without disturbing the existing scorer_test.sh entry.
Run the full headless suite via the verify gate; keep scorer_test.sh, planner_test.sh, ledger_test.sh and all others green; then pre-ship reviewer + soft doc-er.
risks: Scoring ctx duplication: index.ts must mirror planner.renderAssumptions's ctx (highRiskPaths/blastRadius/filesLikely) so the packet matches surfaced assumptions; a mismatch would show inconsistent risk/route. Mitigate by copying the exact ctx fields.
buildTeamPacket receives an arbitrary ScoredAssumption[] — must sort risk-desc internally rather than assume caller pre-sorted (scoreAssumptions sorts, but tests pass raw arrays).
Back-compat: must not alter renderFounderPlan output or PLAN-JSON or the gate1_awaiting event shape beyond an additive teamPacket field, or planner_test.sh/scorer_test.sh/ledger_test.sh could break.
grep-guard expects buildTeamPacket in the index.ts Gate-1 path; the call site must live in index.ts (not only planner.ts).
Editing the verify `&&` chain risks breaking scorer_test.sh's assertion that .pi/foreman.json still references scorer_test.sh; keep that token intact.
Adding teampacket_test.sh to the verify gate means the per-round gate will fail until the new module/test exist; land them together.
Doc-er stage may also touch INTERNALS.md; developer updates it directly so it ships even if doc-er degrades (no conflict expected — additive sections).

proposedGates.name: verify
proposedGates.command: grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
